{{#extend "layout"}} {{#replace "title"}} {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.title" study_name=study_name}} {{/replace}} {{#replace "body"}} {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.instructions"}}
    {{#if email}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.email"}} {{email}}
    • {{/if}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.accessCode"}} {{access_code}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.downloadText"}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.appleStore"}} {{appleStore_url}}
    • {{#if googleStore}}
  • {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-access_code.googleStore"}} {{googleStore_url}}
    • {{/if}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_invite-pin_only.browserLink"}} {{paweb_url}} {{/replace}} {{/extend}}
